description: Demonstration of Solana Pay's transaction requests feature at Atlas Cafe, showcasing how NFTs can serve as loyalty tokens for discounts.
topic_summary: At [t=0:24], the demo introduces transaction requests in Solana Pay. By using an Atlas Cafe NFT, users can receive a 20% discount on transactions, as shown during a purchase of T-shirts at [t=21:60]. The final transaction amount is $0.88 after applying the discount.
